info.title: HL7 FHIR REST API
info.description: Fast Healthcare Interoperability Resources (FHIR) is a standard for health care data exchange. This API provides RESTful access to healthcare resources including patients, practitioners, observations, medications, and more. FHIR R5 is the fifth release of the FHIR specification.

servers.description: FHIR Server Base URL (configure per implementation)

get.description: Retrieve the server's capability statement describing supported resources and operations
Search for patient resources using query parameters

post.description: Create a new patient resource with server-assigned ID

get.description: Retrieve the current state of a patient resource

put.description: Update or create a patient resource

get.description: Retrieve version history for a patient resource
Retrieve a specific version of a patient resource
Retrieve an observation resource by ID
Retrieve a practitioner resource by ID
Retrieve a medication resource by ID
Retrieve version history for all resources on the server

post.description: Submit a batch or transaction bundle containing multiple operations

get.description: Retrieve all resources in the patient compartment (all data associated with a patient)
Search for condition resources (diagnoses, problems, health concerns)
Retrieve a condition resource by ID
Retrieve a medication request resource by ID

tags.name: Patient
tags.description: Demographics and administrative information about an individual receiving care

tags.name: Observation
tags.description: Measurements and simple assertions made about a patient

tags.name: Practitioner
tags.description: Person who is directly or indirectly involved in provisioning healthcare

tags.name: Condition
tags.description: Clinical conditions, diagnoses, problems, and health concerns

tags.name: System
tags.description: System-level operations including capabilities and batch operations
